results.description: BRIDGE ERECTION BOAT (BEB) CONTRACT IS COMPETITIVE BEST VALUE TRADE-OFF SOURCE SELECTION FIVE YEAR, FIRM-FIXED PRICE LOW RATE INITIAL PRODUCTION (LRIP) / FULL RATE PRODUCTION CONTRACT FOR THE PRODUCTION OF BEBS. THE CONTRACT INCLUDES A BASE AND FIVE OPTION PERIODS, WITH A TOTAL OF 257 BEBS AVAILABLE TO DATE FOR ORDER UNDER THE CONTRACT. 66 TEST/LRIP BEBS HAVE BEEN ORDERED TO DATE.     BILATERAL MODIFICATION P00033 TO CONTRACT W56HZV-14-C-0015 IS TO INCORPORATE IN-KIND CONSIDERATION T AGREED TO 24 JANUARY 2017  REGARDING DATA RIGHTS ASSERTIONS AND A STORAGE FEE WAIVER.

results.action_type_description: EXERCISE AN OPTION
results.description: THE BRIDGE ERECTION BOAT (BEB) CONTRACT WAS AWARDED TO BIRDON AMERICA, INC. (BAI) ON 18 NOVEMBER 2013, ON A COMPETITIVE BASIS AFTER COMPLETION OF BEST VALUE TRADE OFF SOURCE SELECTION PROCEDURES PURSUANT TO FAR 15.101-1.  THIS IS A FIVE YEAR, FIRM-FIXED PRICE LOW RATE INITIAL PRODUCTION (LRIP) FULL RATE PRODUCTION CONTRACT FOR THE PRODUCTION OF BEBS. THE CONTRACT INCLUDES A BASE AND FIVE OPTION PERIODS.  THE BEBS ARE SHIPPED-IN-PLACE AND STORED AT THE CONTRACTOR'S FACILITY PENDING A FIELDING SCHEDULE.
